html:
European Commission Daily News, Brussels, June 25, 2026.

Lithuania receives the first disbursement of €956.3 million under the SAFE* program.

Lithuania has received its initial payment of €956.3 million under the Security Action for Europe (SAFE) program.
tldr: Lithuania is receiving significant financial support from the European Union to strengthen the country's security.
lattlast:
Lithuania has received a significant amount of funding from the European Union, specifically €956.3 million. This money comes from a program called SAFE.

The SAFE program is designed to enhance security within Europe. This means that the funds are intended to be used to make Lithuania and the rest of the EU more secure.

This is the first disbursement of funding that the country will receive from this particular project.
